function.name: askQuestions
function.arguments: {"questions": [{"header": "POC scope", "question": "Confirm the initial scope for the Fabrikam RAG chatbot POC so I can start the setup pipeline.", "message": "Planned flow after you confirm: **ARCH** will design the architecture and produce `ARCHITECTURE.md`, then I’ll stop for your approval before fanning out **INFRA + DEV** work, run quality gates and **QA**, generate **DIAGRAM**s, package **DOCS**, and finish with **REPO** hygiene/push readiness.", "options": [{"label": "Quick demo POC", "description": "Fastest path: minimal RAG chatbot with basic ingestion and chat UI/API for demonstration use.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Production-leaning POC", "description": "Adds stronger structure for security, observability, and deployment readiness while staying POC-sized."}, {"label": "Need to customize scope", "description": "I’ll wait for your specific requirements before invoking ARCH."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Stack preference", "question": "Which implementation preference should ARCH optimize for?", "options": [{"label": "Python-first", "description": "Optimize for Python backend and common Azure AI/RAG patterns.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "TypeScript-first", "description": "Optimize for Node/TypeScript services and frontend."}, {"label": "No strong preference", "description": "Let ARCH choose the best-fit stack."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Azure constraints", "question": "What Azure/service constraints should ARCH assume?", "options": [{"label": "Microsoft-first managed services", "description": "Prefer Azure OpenAI, AI Search, managed identity, least privilege, and minimal custom ops.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Keep cost minimal", "description": "Bias toward the cheapest viable POC footprint, even if less feature-rich."}, {"label": "Need custom constraints", "description": "I’ll provide required services, auth, region, or compliance constraints."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}]}

function.name: askQuestions
